hotels.name: Aurora Farm Hotel
hotels.description_fr:
Comfortable Accommodations: Aurora Farm Hotel in North Iceland offers warm and inviting rooms designed for relaxation after a day of exploring. Each room features a private bathroom, cozy interiors, and views of the surrounding countryside.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests can unwind in the hotelâ€™s outdoor spa, featuring geothermal hot springs, a sauna, and tranquil relaxation areas set in nature. The property also offers inviting common spaces and modern amenities designed for comfort year-round.
Delicious Breakfast: A generous breakfast is served each morning, showcasing fresh, locally inspired ingredients to help guests start their day right.
Farm-to-Table Dining: The hotelâ€™s restaurant centers around a traditional fire oven, creating a warm and welcoming atmosphere.
